worker.name: parent-coach-desk
worker.finding: There is no prior fully configured Worker code deployment that has been proven as a rollback target.

pages.sensitive_pattern_note: Counts-only audit found email-like patterns on 9 bounded pages; values were not retained. The editorial page exceeded the 2 MB inspection bound.
pages.finding: The Pages deployment exists and serves core public pages, but its pages.dev hostname exposes historical admin artifacts without Access and is not an approved rollback target.
